raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "darker box (on tabletop, centered between the two arms)",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "Laterally",
    "Precondition": "Both arms have unobstructed lateral access to the left and right faces of the darker box; the end-effectors can align at mid-height of the box without colliding with the tabletop or the box edges; sufficient clearance exists to apply an inward squeeze for a stable pinch since the 30x30x30 cm box exceeds claw grasp size limits.",
    "Postcondition": "The darker box is securely held in a two-handed lateral pinch (supported and stabilized by both end-effectors) and lifted clear of the tabletop surface."
  }
]

parsed_json.Target: darker box (on tabletop, centered between the two arms)
parsed_json.Precondition: Both arms have unobstructed lateral access to the left and right faces of the darker box; the end-effectors can align at mid-height of the box without colliding with the tabletop or the box edges; sufficient clearance exists to apply an inward squeeze for a stable pinch since the 30x30x30 cm box exceeds claw grasp size limits.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The darker box is securely held in a two-handed lateral pinch (supported and stabilized by both end-effectors) and lifted clear of the tabletop surface.
